purpose: Safe profile-based upgrade for the RAISE Dealum application.

privacy_boundary.public_commit_policy: Only publish redacted summaries, role-level receipts, and product capability claims.

company_answer_updates.traction: Beyond the RAISE demo, the founder profile includes local product proof across fiscal/compliance SaaS, high-fidelity invoice/PDF automation, enterprise workflow migration, and browser automation. This supports the claim that ContestOps AI packages real operator work into repeatable opportunity execution.
company_answer_updates.founder_market_fit: The founder has already turned complex, document-heavy and compliance-heavy workflows into structured software and automation. ContestOps AI generalizes that capability for founders applying to competitions, grants, accelerators, and RFP-like opportunities.
company_answer_updates.moat: The moat compounds through opportunity templates, evidence ledgers, redaction policies, browser automation receipts, reusable V generators, VImport extraction/redaction, Veloclaw governance patterns, and WAIBAv execution playbooks.
